plugins.name: elitea-skills
plugins.description: Full ELITEA toolkit — both agents and all four skills in one install.

plugins.name: elitea-builder
plugins.description: ELITEA Builder agent — designs and deploys ELITEA-native artifacts (agents, pipelines, toolkits, credentials, version links).

plugins.name: elitea-integrator
plugins.description: ELITEA Integrator agent — connects external systems to ELITEA via REST/MCP (GH Actions cron, Power Automate, Teams bots, Python/JS clients, webhook handlers).

plugins.name: elitea-platform
plugins.description: Foundation: REST API conventions (v1/v2), auth, ID rules, secret placeholders, 21 built-in MCP tools, status codes, base URLs. Load first for any ELITEA work.

plugins.name: elitea-pipeline
plugins.description: Pipeline YAML — schema for all 10 modern node types, state management, runtime helpers (elitea_client.auth_token, elitea_state), pattern catalog, real worked examples.

plugins.name: elitea-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit types (OpenAPI, MCP, datasource, custom_python, application-as-tool), credentials linkage via {elitea_title, private} refs, real OpenAPI specs.

plugins.name: elitea-testing
plugins.description: Run, predict, debug, schedule ELITEA artifacts. Includes nudge case study (full BUILD→DEPLOY→TEST→SCHEDULE lifecycle) and update_agent.py script.
